instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The user has provided their own HTML/CSS design. Your primary objective is to implement and integrate their exact HTML/CSS structure and styling into the React frontend.
Ensure all interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='submit-button').
Only apply E1 design system rules where the user's provided design is incomplete or missing elements.
Use React (.js) and standard Tailwind CSS as the baseline. Do not use .tsx files.
If using Shadcn for missing interactive components (like Dialogs or Selects), heavily customize them to seamlessly match the user's provided CSS.

layout_and_spacing.general: Utilize provided HTML structure. Supplement with Tailwind generously if gaps exist.

motion_and_interaction.strategy: Preserve any CSS animations from the user's code. Add subtle hover states (e.g., opacity changes or slight transforms) only if missing.
